## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm -r test && pnpm -r build` pass locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`) if a published package changed
- [ ] The core stays zero-dependency; renderer parity (dom ↔ react) is preserved
- [ ] No non-determinism introduced in the preview/brief derivations
